caption.full:
Casey Affleck's new film 'Company' wraps filming

Casey Affleck directed and wrote the gothic mystery film 'Company,' set on a winter night in 1975. The project stars Nick Nolte, Ben Mendelsohn, and Scoot McNairy. Filming for the project wrapped earlier this year in Whistler, Canada.

Send this to a friend who loves a good mystery!

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
